{{infobox football tournament season
|title                      = Copa do Brasil
|year                       = 2023
|other_titles               =
|image                      =
|image_size                 = 150 px
|caption                    = 
|country                    = Brazil
|dates                      = {{nowrap|21 February – 24 September}}
|num_teams                  = 92
|winners                    = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] {{small|(1st title)}}
|second                     = [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|continental_cup_title      = [[2024 Copa Libertadores]]
|continental_cup_qualifiers = [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|matches                    = 122
|goals                      = 304
|scoring_leader             = [[Pedro (footballer, born 1997)|Pedro]]<br>[[Alef Manga]]<br>[[Lorran (footballer, born 1995)|Lorran]]<br>[[Tiquinho Soares]]<br>(5 goals each)
|award                      = {{nowrap|[[Rodrigo Nestor]] (São Paulo)}}
|prev_season                = [[2022 Copa do Brasil|2022]]
|next_season                = [[2024 Copa do Brasil|2024]]
|updated                    = 
}}
The '''2023 Copa do Brasil''' (officially the '''Copa Betano do Brasil 2023''' for sponsorship reasons)<ref>{{cite web|url=https://maquinadoesporte.com.br/futebol/exclusivo-betano-tera-title-sponsor-da-copa-do-brasil-ate-2025/ |title=EXCLUSIVO: Betano terá title sponsor da Copa do Brasil até 2025 |publisher=Máquina do Esporte |date=1 December 2022 |language=Portuguese}}</ref> was the 35th edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]] football competition. It was held between 21 February and 24 September 2023.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/index/brasileirao-sera-paralisado-em-datas-fifa-e-copa-do-brasil-tera-finais |title=Calendário 2023: Brasileirão será paralisado em Datas FIFA pela primeira vez |publisher=CBF |date=21 September 2022 |language=Portuguese}}</ref>

The competition was contested by 92 teams, either qualified by participating in their respective state championships (70), by the 2023 [[CBF ranking]] (10), by the [[2022 Copa do Nordeste]] (1), by the [[2022 Copa Verde]] (1), by the [[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B|2022 Série B]] (1), by the [[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A|2022 Série A]] (1) or those qualified for [[2023 Copa Libertadores]] (8).

In the final, [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]] defeated the defending champions [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]] to win their first title.<ref>{{cite web|title=São Paulo conquista Copa Betano do Brasil 2023 |url=https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/noticias/copa-brasil-masculino/sao-paulo-conquista-copa-betano-do-brasil-2023 |date=24 September 2023 |publisher=CBF |language=Portuguese}}</ref> As champions, São Paulo qualified for the [[2024 Copa Libertadores]] group stage and the [[2024 Supercopa do Brasil]].<ref name="regulations">{{cite web|url=https://conteudo.cbf.com.br/cdn/202212/20221230131846_678.pdf |title=Regulamento Específico da Competição Copa do Brasil 2023 |publisher=CBF |language=Portuguese}}</ref>

==Qualified teams==
Teams in '''bold''' are qualified directly for the third round.
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!width=130|Association
!width=210|Team
!Qualification method
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação de Futebol do Acre|Acre]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Sport Clube Humaitá|Humaitá]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Acreano]] champions
|-
|[[São Francisco Futebol Clube (AC)|São Francisco]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Acreano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=3 |[[Federação Alagoana de Futebol|Alagoas]]<br>{{small|3 berths}}
|[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Alagoano]] champions
|-
|[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Alagoano]] runners-up
|-
|[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Alagoano#2023 Copa do Brasil play-off|2023 Copa do Brasil play-off]] winners
|-
|[[Federação Amapaense de Futebol|Amapá]]<br>{{small|1 berth}}
|[[Trem Desportivo Clube|Trem]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Amapaense]] champions
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação Amazonense de Futebol|Amazonas]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Manaus Futebol Clube|Manaus]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Amazonense]] champions
|-
|[[Princesa do Solimões Esporte Clube|Princesa do Solimões]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Amazonense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=5 |[[Federação Bahiana de Futebol|Bahia]]<br>{{small|3 + 2 berths}}
|[[Alagoinhas Atlético Clube|Atlético de Alagoinhas]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Baiano]] champions
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Jacuipense|Jacuipense]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Baiano]] runners-up
|-
|[[Associação Desportiva Bahia de Feira|Bahia de Feira]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Baiano]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
|4th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]
|8th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|rowspan=5 |[[Federação Cearense de Futebol|Ceará]]<br>{{small|3 + 1 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 8th place'''
|-
|[[Caucaia Esporte Clube|Caucaia]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Cearense#First stage|2022 Campeonato Cearense first round]] winners
|-
|[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube (CE)|Ferroviário]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Cearense]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Associação Desportiva Iguatu|Iguatu]]{{ref label|id4|a|a}}
|[[2022 Campeonato Cearense]] 4th place
|-
|[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]
|3rd best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação de Futebol do Estado do Espírito Santo|Espírito Santo]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Real Noroeste Capixaba Futebol Clube|Real Noroeste]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Capixaba]] champions
|-
|[[Vitória Futebol Clube (ES)|Vitória]]
|2022 [[Copa Espírito Santo]] champions
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação de Futebol do Distrito Federal|Federal District]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Brasiliense FC|Brasiliense]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Brasiliense]] champions
|-
|[[Ceilândia Esporte Clube|Ceilândia]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Brasiliense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=3 |[[Federação Goiana de Futebol|Goiás]]<br>{{small|3 berths}}
|[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético Goianiense]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Goiano]] champions
|-
|[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Goiano]] runners-up
|-
|[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Goiano]] 3rd place
|-
|rowspan=3 |[[Federação Maranhense de Futebol|Maranhão]]<br>{{small|3 berths}}
|[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Maranhense]] champions
|-
|[[Cordino Esporte Clube|Cordino]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Maranhense]] runners-up 
|-
|[[Tuntum Esporte Clube|Tuntum]]
|2022 [[Copa Federação Maranhense de Futebol]] champions
|-
|rowspan=3 |[[Federação Matogrossense de Futebol|Mato Grosso]]<br>{{small|3 berths}}
|[[Cuiabá Esporte Clube|Cuiabá]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|[[União Esporte Clube|União Rondonópolis]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Mato-Grossense]] runners-up
|-
|[[Nova Mutum Esporte Clube|Nova Mutum]]
|2022 [[Copa FMF]] champions
|-
|[[Federação de Futebol de Mato Grosso do Sul|Mato Grosso do Sul]] {{small|1 berth}}
|[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Sul-Mato-Grossense]] champions
|-
|rowspan=7 |[[Federação Mineira de Futebol|Minas Gerais]]<br>{{small|4 + 2 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 7th place'''
|-
|'''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série B]] champions'''
|-
|[[Athletic Club (MG)|Athletic]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Mineiro]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Associação Atlética Caldense|Caldense]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Mineiro]] 4th place
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Democrata|Democrata GV]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Mineiro#Troféu Inconfidência|2022 Troféu Inconfidência winners]]
|-
|[[Tombense Futebol Clube|Tombense]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Mineiro#Troféu Inconfidência|2022 Troféu Inconfidência runners-up]]
|-
|[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]
|2nd best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|rowspan=4 |[[Federação Paraense de Futebol|Pará]]<br>{{small|3 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu]]'''
|'''[[2022 Copa Verde]] champions'''
|-
|[[Clube do Remo|Remo]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paraense]] champions
|-
|[[Tuna Luso Brasileira|Tuna Luso]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paraense]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paraense]] 4th place
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação Paraibana de Futebol|Paraíba]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Campinense Clube|Campinense]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paraibano]] champions
|-
|[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paraibano]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=5 |[[Federação Paranaense de Futebol|Paraná]]<br>{{small|4 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 6th place'''
|-
|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paranaense]] champions
|-
|[[Maringá Futebol Clube|Maringá]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paranaense]] runners-up
|-
|[[Operário Ferroviário Esporte Clube|Operário Ferroviário]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paranaense]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Londrina Esporte Clube|Londrina]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paranaense]] 5th place
|-
|rowspan=4 |[[Federação Pernambucana de Futebol|Pernambuco]]<br>{{small|3 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]'''
|'''[[2022 Copa do Nordeste]] runners-up'''
|-
|[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Pernambucano]] champions
|-
|[[Retrô Futebol Clube Brasil|Retrô]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Pernambucano]] runners-up
|-
|[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Pernambucano#First stage|2022 Campeonato Pernambucano first round]] best placed team not already qualified 
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação de Futebol do Piauí|Piauí]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Fluminense Esporte Clube|Fluminense]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Piauiense]] champions
|-
|[[Parnahyba Sport Club|Parnahyba]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Piauiense]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=7 |[[Federação de Futebol do Estado do Rio de Janeiro|Rio de Janeiro]]<br>{{small|5 + 2 berths}}
|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
|'''[[2022 Copa Libertadores]] champions'''
|-
|'''[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 3rd place'''
|-
|[[CR Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Carioca]] 3rd place
|-
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Carioca]] 4th place
|-
|[[Nova Iguaçu FC|Nova Iguaçu]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Carioca#Torneio Independência|2022 Torneio Independência]] champions
|-
|[[Resende FC|Resende]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Carioca#Torneio Independência|2022 Torneio Independência]] runners-up
|-
|[[Volta Redonda FC|Volta Redonda]]
|2022 [[Copa Rio (state cup)|Copa Rio]] champions
|-
|rowspan=2 |{{nowrap|[[Federação Norte-Riograndense de Futebol|Rio Grande do Norte]]}} {{small|2 berths}}
|[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Potiguar]] champions
|-
|[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Potiguar]] runners-up
|-
|rowspan=6|[[Federação Gaúcha de Futebol|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>{{small|4 + 1 + 1 berths}}
|'''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] runners-up'''
|-
|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Gaúcho]] champions
|-
|[[Ypiranga Futebol Clube|Ypiranga]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Gaúcho]] runners-up
|-
|[[Grêmio Esportivo Brasil|Brasil de Pelotas]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Gaúcho]] 4th place
|-
|[[Esporte Clube São Luiz|São Luiz]]
|2022 [[Copa FGF]] champions
|-
|[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]
|5th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|[[Federação de Futebol do Estado de Rondônia|Rondônia]]<br>{{small|1 berth}}
|[[Real Ariquemes Esporte Clube|Real Ariquemes]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Rondoniense]] champions
|-
|[[Federação Roraimense de Futebol|Roraima]]<br>{{small|1 berth}}
|[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (RR)|São Raimundo]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Roraimense]] champions
|-
|rowspan=6 |[[Federação Catarinense de Futebol|Santa Catarina]]<br>{{small|3 + 3 berths}}
|[[Brusque Futebol Clube|Brusque]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Catarinense]] champions
|-
|[[Camboriú Futebol Clube|Camboriú]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Catarinense]] runners-up
|-
|[[Clube Náutico Marcílio Dias|Marcílio Dias]]
|2022 [[Copa Santa Catarina]] champions
|-
|[[Associação Chapecoense de Futebol|Chapecoense]]
|6th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|[[Avaí FC|Avaí]]
|7th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]{{ref label|id4|b|b}}
|10th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|rowspan=10 |[[Federação Paulista de Futebol|São Paulo]]<br>{{small|5 + 3 + 2 berths}}
|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] champions'''
|-
|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 4th place'''
|-
|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
|'''[[2022 Campeonato Brasileiro Série A]] 9th place'''
|-
|[[Red Bull Bragantino]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paulista]] 4th place
|-
|[[Ituano FC|Ituano]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paulista]] 5th place
|-
|[[São Bernardo Futebol Clube|São Bernardo]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paulista]] 6th place
|-
|[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (SP)|Botafogo]]
|[[2022 Campeonato Paulista#Overall table|2022 Troféu do Interior]] runners-up
|-
|[[Marília Atlético Clube|Marília]]
|2022 [[Copa Paulista]] runners-up
|-
|[[Santos FC|Santos]]
|best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]
|9th best placed team in the 2022 [[CBF ranking]] not already qualified
|-
|rowspan=2 |[[Federação Sergipana de Futebol|Sergipe]]<br>{{small|2 berths}}
|[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Sergipano]] champions
|-
|[[Falcon Futebol Clube|Falcon]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Sergipano]] runners-up
|-
|[[Federação Tocantinense de Futebol|Tocantins]]<br>{{small|1 berth}}
|[[Tocantinópolis Esporte Clube|Tocantinópolis]]
|2022 [[Campeonato Tocantinense]] champions
|}
:{{note label|id4||a}}{{small|Originally, [[Pacajus Esporte Clube|Pacajus]] qualified for the Copa do Brasil by winning the 2022 Copa Fares Lopes, however, CBF announced that the 2022 Copa Fares Lopes did not meet the requirements as Copa do Brasil qualification tournament. CBF awarded the berth to the best placed team in the 2022 Campeonato Cearense not already qualified, [[Associação Desportiva Iguatu|Iguatu]] (2022 Campeonato Cearense 4th place).<ref>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/ce/futebol/copa-do-brasil/noticia/2022/12/27/iguatu-fica-com-quarta-vaga-do-futebol-cearense-e-estara-na-copa-do-brasil-em-2023-entenda.ghtml |title=Iguatu fica com quarta vaga do futebol cearense e estará na Copa do Brasil em 2023; entenda |date=27 December 2022 |publisher=Globo |language=Portuguese}}</ref>}}
:{{note label|id4||b}}{{small|As [[Guarani FC|Guarani]] (São Paulo) and [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] (Santa Catarina) had the same number of points in the CBF ranking, a draw to determine the qualified team was held on 16 January 2023, 15:00 at CBF headquarters in Rio de Janeiro.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://ge.globo.com/sp/campinas-e-regiao/futebol/noticia/2023/01/16/criciuma-ganha-o-sorteio-contra-o-guarani-e-fica-com-a-vaga-para-a-copa-do-brasil.ghtml |title=Criciúma ganha o sorteio contra o Guarani e fica com a vaga para a Copa do Brasil |date=16 January 2023 |publisher=Globo |language=Portuguese}}</ref>}}

==Format==
The competition is a [[single-elimination tournament]], the first two rounds are played as a single match and the rest are played as a [[two-legged tie]]s. Twelve teams enter in the third round, which are teams qualified for 2023 Copa Libertadores (8), Série A best team not qualified for 2023 Copa Libertadores, Série B champions, Copa Verde champions and Copa do Nordeste runners-up. The remaining 80 teams play in the first round, the 40 winners play the second round, and the 20 winners play the third round. Finally, the sixteen third round winners advance to the round of 16.

==Schedule==
The schedule of the competition will be as follows:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://conteudo.cbf.com.br/cdn/202209/20220921204852_532.pdf |title=CALENDÁRIO DO FUTEBOL BRASILEIRO 2023 |publisher=CBF |language=Portuguese}}</ref>

{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Stage
!First leg
!Second leg
|-
|First round
|colspan=2|{{unbulleted list
|Week 1: 22 February
|Week 2: 1 March
}}
|-
|Second round
|colspan=2|{{unbulleted list
|Week 1: 8 March
|Week 2: 15 March
}}
|-
|Third round
|12 April
|26 April
|-
|Round of 16
|17 May
|31 May
|-
|Quarter-finals
|5 July
|12 July
|-
|Semi-finals
|26 July
|16 August
|-
|Finals
|17 September
|24 September
|}

==Draw==
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil first round|Draw}}
{{clear}}

==First round==
{{main|2023 Copa do Brasil first round}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil first round|Format}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil first round|First round}}

==Second round==
{{main|2023 Copa do Brasil second round}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil second round|Format}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil second round|Second round}}

==Third round==
{{main|2023 Copa do Brasil third round}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil third round|Draw}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil third round|Format}}
{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil third round|Third round}}

==Final rounds==
<!--{{#lst:2023 Copa do Brasil final rounds|Format}}-->

===Bracket===
<section begin=Bracket />
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| team-width = 180
| RD1 = [[#Round of 16|Round of 16]]
| RD2 = [[#Quarter-finals|Quarter-finals]]
| RD3 = [[#Semi-finals|Semi-finals]]
| RD4 = [[#Finals|Finals]]

| RD1-team01      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos FC|Santos]]
| RD1-score01-1   = 0
| RD1-score01-2   = 1
| RD1-score01-agg = 1 {{small|(3)}}
| RD1-team02      = {{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[EC Bahia|Bahia]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score02-1   = 0
| RD1-score02-2   = 1
| RD1-score02-agg = {{nowrap|1 {{small|(4)}}}}

| RD1-team03      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]'''
| RD1-score03-1   = 1
| RD1-score03-2   = 1
| RD1-score03-agg = 2
| RD1-team04      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]
| RD1-score04-1   = 1
| RD1-score04-2   = 0
| RD1-score04-agg = 1

| RD1-team05      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]
| RD1-score05-1   = 0
| RD1-score05-2   = 0
| RD1-score05-agg = 0
| RD1-team06      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD1-score06-1   = 0
| RD1-score06-2   = 2
| RD1-score06-agg = 2

| RD1-team07      = {{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score07-1   = 3
| RD1-score07-2   = 0
| RD1-score07-agg = {{nowrap|3 {{small|(4)}}}}
| RD1-team08      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
| RD1-score08-1   = 2
| RD1-score08-2   = 1
| RD1-score08-agg = 3 {{small|(2)}}

| RD1-team09      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score09-1   = 2
| RD1-score09-2   = 1
| RD1-score09-agg = {{nowrap|3 {{small|(5)}}}}
| RD1-team10      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]
| RD1-score10-1   = 0
| RD1-score10-2   = 3
| RD1-score10-agg = 3 {{small|(4)}}

| RD1-team11      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD1-score11-1   = 2
| RD1-score11-2   = 0
| RD1-score11-agg = 2 {{small|(1)}}
| RD1-team12      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score12-1   = 0
| RD1-score12-2   = 2
| RD1-score12-agg = {{nowrap|2 {{small|(3)}}}}

| RD1-team13      = {{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]
| RD1-score13-1   = 0
| RD1-score13-2   = 3
| RD1-score13-agg = 3 {{small|(3)}}
| RD1-team14      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]''' {{pso}}
| RD1-score14-1   = 2
| RD1-score14-2   = 1
| RD1-score14-agg = {{nowrap|3 {{small|(5)}}}}

| RD1-team15      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''
| RD1-score15-1   = 3
| RD1-score15-2   = 0
| RD1-score15-agg = 3
| RD1-team16      = {{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Fortaleza EC|Fortaleza]]
| RD1-score16-1   = 0
| RD1-score16-2   = 1
| RD1-score16-agg = 1

| RD2-team01      = {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[EC Bahia|Bahia]]
| RD2-score01-1   = 1 
| RD2-score01-2   = 1
| RD2-score01-agg = 2 {{small|(3)}}
| RD2-team02      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]''' {{pso}}
| RD2-score02-1   = 1
| RD2-score02-2   = 1
| RD2-score02-agg = {{nowrap|2 {{small|(4)}}}}

| RD2-team03      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD2-score03-1   = 2
| RD2-score03-2   = 2
| RD2-score03-agg = 4
| RD2-team04      = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]
| RD2-score04-1   = 1
| RD2-score04-2   = 0
| RD2-score04-agg = 1

| RD2-team05      = {{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]
| RD2-score05-1   = 1 
| RD2-score05-2   = 2
| RD2-score05-agg = 3 {{small|(1)}}
| RD2-team06      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]''' {{pso}}
| RD2-score06-1   = 0
| RD2-score06-2   = 3
| RD2-score06-agg = {{nowrap|3 {{small|(3)}}}}

| RD2-team07      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
| RD2-score07-1   = 1
| RD2-score07-2   = 2
| RD2-score07-agg = 3
| RD2-team08      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]
| RD2-score08-1   = 0
| RD2-score08-2   = 1
| RD2-score08-agg = 1

| RD3-team01      = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]
| RD3-score01-1   = 0
| RD3-score01-2   = 0
| RD3-score01-agg = 0
| RD3-team02      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD3-score02-1   = 2
| RD3-score02-2   = 1
| RD3-score02-agg = 3

| RD3-team03      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
| RD3-score03-1   = 2
| RD3-score03-2   = 0
| RD3-score03-agg = 2
| RD3-team04      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
| RD3-score04-1   = 1
| RD3-score04-2   = 2
| RD3-score04-agg = 3

| RD4-team01      = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]
| RD4-score01-1   = 0
| RD4-score01-2   = 1
| RD4-score01-agg = 1
| RD4-team02      = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''
| RD4-score02-1   = 1
| RD4-score02-2   = 1
| RD4-score02-agg = 2
}}<section end=Bracket />

===Round of 16===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]'''| |3–3 {{pso|5–4}}|[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]| |2–0|1–3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]]| |3–3 {{pso|3–5}}|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''| |0–2|3–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]'''| |3–3 {{pso|4–2}}|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]| |3–2|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Fluminense FC|Fluminense]]| |0–2|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''| |0–0|0–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Santos FC|Santos]]| |1–1 {{pso|3–4}}|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''| |0–0|1–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]'''| |3–1|[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]| |3–0|0–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]| |2–2 {{pso|1–3}}|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''| |2–0|0–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''| |2–1|[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]]| |1–1|1–0}}
|}<section end=Round of 16 />

===Quarter-finals===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''| |2–2 (4–3 [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|p]])|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]| |1–1|1–1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]]| |1–3|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''| |0–1|1–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''| |3–3 (3–1 [[Penalty shoot-out (association football)|p]])|[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]| |0–1|3–2}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Club Athletico Paranaense|Athletico Paranaense]]| |1–4|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''| |1–2|0–2}}
|}<section end=Quarter-finals />

===Semi-finals===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]'''| |3–2|[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]| |1–2|2–0}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''| |3–0|[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]| |2–0|1–0}}
|}<section end=Semi-finals />

===Finals===
{{main|2023 Copa do Brasil Finals}}

{{Football box
|date= {{Start date|2023|09|17|df=y}}
|time= {{UTZ|16:00|-3}}
|team1= [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}}
|score= 0–1
|team2= {{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]
|goals1=
|goals2=
*[[Jonathan Calleri|Calleri]] {{goal|45+1}}
|stadium= [[Maracanã Stadium|Maracanã]], [[Rio de Janeiro]]
|attendance= 67,350
|referee= [[Anderson Daronco]] ([[Federação Gaúcha de Futebol|Rio Grande do Sul]])
|report= https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/competicoes/copa-brasil-masculino/2023/121
}}
----
{{Football box
|date= {{Start date|2023|09|24|df=y}}
|time= {{UTZ|16:00|-3}}
|team1= [[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]] {{flagicon|São Paulo}}
|score= 1–1
|team2= {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] 
|goals1=
*[[Rodrigo Nestor]] {{goal|45+5}}
|goals2=
*[[Bruno Henrique (footballer, born 1990)|Bruno Henrique]] {{goal|44}}
|stadium= [[Estádio do Morumbi|Morumbi]], [[São Paulo]]
|attendance= 63,077
|referee= Bráulio da Silva Machado ([[Federação Catarinense de Futebol|Santa Catarina]])
|report= https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/competicoes/copa-brasil-masculino/2023/122
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!2023 Copa do Brasil winners
|-
|'''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo]]'''<br>'''1st Title'''
|}

==Top goalscorers==
{|class=wikitable style="text-align:left;"
!Rank
!Player
!Team
!Goals
|-
|align=center rowspan=4|1
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Pedro (footballer, born 1997)|Pedro]]
|[[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|align=center rowspan=4|5
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Alef Manga]]
|[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Lorran (footballer, born 1995)|Lorran]]
|[[Nova Mutum Esporte Clube|Nova Mutum]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Tiquinho Soares]]
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
|-
|align=center rowspan=2|4
|{{flagicon|CHN}} [[Aloísio (footballer, born 1988)|Aloísio]]
|[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]
|align=center rowspan=2|4
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato (footballer, born 1990)|Renato]]
|[[Clube de Regatas Brasil|CRB]]
|-
|align=center rowspan=7|7
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Alan Patrick (footballer, born 1991)|Alan Patrick]]
|[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]
|align=center rowspan=7|3
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Allan Rosário]]
|[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (RR)|São Raimundo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Gabriel Teixeira|Biel]]
|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Carlos Eduardo (footballer, born 1989)|Carlos Eduardo]]
|[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Cauly]]
|[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Marcos Leonardo]]
|[[Santos FC|Santos]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Serginho (footballer, born 1990)|Serginho]]
|[[Maringá Futebol Clube|Maringá]]

<!--
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Ferreira (footballer, born 1997)|Ferreira]]
|{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]
-->
|}

===Team of the tournament===
{| class="wikitable"
!Position
!Player
!Team
|-
|align=center|Goalkeeper
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rafael (footballer, born 1989)|Rafael]]          ||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]        
|-
|align=center rowspan=4|Defenders
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rafinha (footballer, born 1985)|Rafinha]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Fabrício Bruno]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Lucas Beraldo|Beraldo]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Caio Paulista]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]         
|-
| rowspan="4" align="center" |Midfielders
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Renato Augusto]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]
|-
|{{flagicon|PAR}} [[Mathías Villasanti]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Grêmio FBPA|Grêmio]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Rodrigo Nestor]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo FC|São Paulo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|URU}} [[Giorgian de Arrascaeta]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|-
| rowspan="2" align="center" |Forwards
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Wellington Rato]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[São Paulo F.C.|São Paulo]]
|-
|{{flagicon|BRA}} [[Bruno Henrique (footballer, born 1990)|Bruno Henrique]]||{{flagicon|BRA}} [[CR Flamengo|Flamengo]]
|}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

{{Copa do Brasil}}
{{2023 in Brazilian football}}
{{2023 in South American football (CONMEBOL)}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa do Brasil 2023}}
[[Category:2023 Copa do Brasil| ]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2023]]
[[Category:2023 in Brazilian football]]
